title: NDIC Boss Urges Financial Institutions to Leverage Opportunities for Growth - FinancialEDGE
description: The Managing Director/Chief Executive of the Nigeria Deposit Insurance Corporation (NDIC), Bello Hassan, has emphasized the need for financial institutions to leverage opportunities for growth and stability in order to support the current administration's vision of achieving a $1 trillion-dollar economy. Hassan disclosed this in Lagos while delivering the keynote address at the 2024 Finance
html: The Managing Director/Chief Executive of the Nigeria Deposit Insurance Corporation (NDIC), Bello Hassan, has emphasized the need for financial institutions to leverage opportunities for growth and stability in order to support the current administration’s vision of achieving a $1 trillion-dollar economy.
